data_policy: L5, L10, and season records come from verified player game logs. Opponent rank prefers position, minutes, and estimated-pace adjusted averages; verified position or overall rankings remain as fallback.

opponent_rank_methodology.limitations: Not position-adjusted and not pace-adjusted; descriptive matchup context only.

position_rank_methodology.limitations: Not pace adjusted; hybrid positions are assigned to one broad group.

pace_minutes_rank_methodology.possession_formula: FGA - OREB + TOV + 0.44 * FTA; game estimate is average of both teams
pace_minutes_rank_methodology.limitations: Possessions are estimates; hybrid positions map to one broad group.
